comparison: op/object-only policy ignores args and provenance
interpretation: Object/resource matching would accept every saved protected decision denied by IntentCap.
Even argument-constrained leases are unsafe when context labels and control provenance are ignored.

comparison: LLM-like full event args, no provenance
interpretation: A complete-looking event-specific lease is still unsafe without deterministic provenance checks.

comparison: same exposed object count, missing provenance/argument authority
interpretation: Only the requested user tool is exposed for the case, but arguments/provenance are broad.

comparison: broader static authority and missing provenance/argument authority
interpretation: All tools in the requested user tool's toolkit/server are exposed for the case.

comparison: broader static authority and missing provenance/argument authority
interpretation: All benchmark user-facing tools are exposed for every case.

comparison: broader static authority and missing provenance/argument authority
interpretation: All tools observed in the mixed trace are exposed for every case.

interpretation: All tools in the InjecAgent catalog are exposed for every case.

comparison: same exposed object count, missing provenance/argument authority
